title: Iron Padlock - 2 Pcs, 32 MM, Heavy Duty Weatherproof, Safety for Shed, Warehouse, Fence, Garage, Garden, Gym, Locker
features: 【Quality Material】The padlock is made of iron material. The lock body is thickened,not easily damaged, and can be used outdoors for a long time
【Upgraded Lock Cylinder】Adopts upgraded lock cylinder design. The lock cylinder has been strictly inspected and tested repeatedly. It is safe and reliable and can be used repeatedly without damage
【Upgraded Design】Adopts upgraded design, not afraid of wind and rain, and has water filter holes, suitable for all seasons and various weathers, providing you with long term protection

【Equipped with 3 Keys】Each padlock is equipped with 3 keys, ensuring that you will not be unable to open the lock because of losing a key, and you can have enough spare keys for family and friends to use
【Multiple Uses】Ideal for use in offices, homes, warehouses, fences, sheds, yard doors, shed doors, gym and sports lockers, boxes, toolboxes and more to protect your valuables
description: Specification: Material: iron Color: green Size: 38MM Quantity: 2 Package Contents: 2×Iron Padlock with 3 Keys Features: 1. Made of iron material, will not be damaged by bad weather, and can be used outdoors for a long time. 2.
